title: Trips
subtitle: From the next departure to every moment worth keeping.

filters.label: Filter trips
filters.empty: There are no trips in this category yet.

today.title: Today
today.subtitle: Plan today, prepare for the next departure, or close out the journey you just finished.

noTrip.title: You are not traveling today
noTrip.description: Prepare one thing for the next trip, or simply make a plan for today.

place.label: Here and now
place.emptyDescription: Add a city or region and Today will remember it and show the current weather.
place.placeholder: Shanghai, Tokyo, Ho Chi Minh City…
place.notFound: No match found. Try a city or region name.
place.failed: Location search is unavailable. Please try again.

quickCapture.label: Quick capture
quickCapture.title: What is happening right now?
quickCapture.description: Write it down first. Add a title, trip, and audience while you capture it.

ai.title: Let AI help organize the journey
ai.description: Open the current trip to chat about plans, costs, and travel moments, then shape them into a travelogue.

focus.tripDescription: Open the current trip to check the route, timing, and shared details.
focus.prepareDescription: Open the upcoming trip to confirm dates, routes, and what remains to do.
focus.reflectionTitle: Give the journey a proper ending
focus.reflectionDescription: Choose one moment worth keeping and shape it into a travelogue.
focus.homeTitle: Give today a place to land
focus.homeDescription: Write today's plan or reflect on a journey you just finished.

journal.title: Travelogues
journal.subtitle: Turn places, impressions, and honest moments from the road into stories.
journal.localNotice: The story and publication state are stored locally. Images and attachments for linked trips use the configured media service.

delete.title: Delete this travelogue?
delete.description: This cannot be undone. The travelogue will be removed from this device.

detail.mapUnavailable: Link a trip to show its map
detail.askPlaceholder: For example: pull out the places worth revisiting
detail.aiPreviewNotice: Frontend preview: answers currently use a local excerpt. The configured AI model will be used after the travelogue service is connected.
detail.aiPreviewAnswer: About “{{question}}”: this travelogue records “{{excerpt}}…”. Once AI is connected, this area will answer using the full story and linked trip.

empty.title: Start with one small moment
empty.description: It does not need to be an essay. A scene, a café, or one honest sentence is enough.

composer.title: Record this moment
composer.description: Capture it first. You can organize it later.
composer.statusNotice: Drafts are for ongoing notes. Published entries appear in the finished collection. This remains a frontend preview: status is not synced to your account and trip visibility does not share it yet.
composer.pasteHint: Paste images directly. PDF, Markdown, TXT, and CSV are saved as attachments.
composer.mediaNeedsTrip: Link a trip before uploading images or attachments
composer.mediaTooLarge: Files must be 2 MB or smaller
composer.mediaUnsupported: This file type is not supported

empty.title: No trips yet
empty.subtitle: Create your first trip to start planning stops, votes, and shared expenses.

destination.title: Where to?
destination.description: Pick a city or region for this trip.

budget.title: Budget?
budget.description: A planned total helps the agent stay realistic.

party.title: How many people?
party.description: Planned party size — you can invite members later.

review.title: Looks good?
review.description: Create the trip with these details. TBD fields stay open.
